info.name: WorkForceHub Local
info.description: Single Postman collection for Account, Profile, and Time services. Run the login request once to populate the shared bearer token, then execute the other requests.

exec: const profileId = body.id || body.profileId || body.Id || body.ProfileId || '';
const profileId = body.id || body.profileId || body.Id || body.ProfileId || '';

request.description: Multipart create example with a JSON `payload` field and an optional `profilePicture` file.

body.raw:
{
  "employeeNumber": "EMP-1001",
  "firstName": "John",
  "lastName": "Doe Updated",
  "workEmail": "john.doe@workforcehub.local",
  "personalEmail": "john.personal@local.test",
  "phoneNumber": "+212611111111",
  "address": "Casablanca, Morocco",
  "dateOfBirth": "1998-03-10T00:00:00Z",
  "jobTitle": "HR Specialist",
  "department": "Human Resources",
  "managerProfileId": null,
  "employmentType": "FullTime",
  "hireDate": "2026-03-16T00:00:00Z",
  "organizationRole": "HR Specialist"
}
